Recommended Tools

The AI stack I use and recommend for every client. These tools form the foundation of a powerful second brain system.

Knowledge Management

Notion

All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, and databases

Obsidian

Local-first markdown notes with graph view

Readwise

Sync highlights from books and articles

AI Assistants

Claude

Anthropic's AI for analysis and writing

ChatGPT

OpenAI's conversational AI

Perplexity

AI search with cited sources

Automation

Zapier

Connect apps and automate workflows

Make

Visual automation builder

n8n

Open-source workflow automation

Capture

Otter.ai

AI meeting transcription

Voice Memos

Quick audio capture (iOS/Mac)

Raycast

Keyboard-driven productivity launcher
